chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Cr. Misc. A. No. 763 of 2023 Date Order with Signature of Judge 1.For hearing of MA No.11905/24 2.For hearing of main case 08.09.2025 Mr. Muhammad Noonari, DPG ---------- None present for applicant. No intimation is received. Same was the case on last date. This Cr. Misc. Application is dismissed for non-prosecution. J U D G E Ashraf
